Title: Add New Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, at least one catalog exists
Steps:
[NAV] Open Catalog module > Click on any catalog
[ACT] Click Add > Category
[ASSERT] Verify new category screen displays
[ACT] Review required fields: Category name, Code
[ACT] Fill all required fields
[ACT] Add optional data (description, images)
[ACT] Click Save
[ASSERT] Verify category in list
Assertions:
[STATE] New category screen displays
[STATE] Category name field marked as required
[STATE] Code field marked as required
[STATE] Optional fields available
[STATE] System saves new category
[DOM] Category appears in catalog tree
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories — verify new category returned
[CONSOLE] No errors on create
Failure_Signals: Category not in tree after save; required field validation bypassed; code field not enforced

Title: Edit Existing Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, test category exists
Steps:
[NAV] Right-click on category > Manage
[ASSERT] Verify edit screen displays with blocks: Name (required), Priority, Visible toggle, Code (required), Property block, Image, Tax type, Tags, SEO block, Search index block, Description
[ACT] Modify any fields
[ACT] Click Save
Assertions:
[STATE] Edit screen displays with all data blocks
[STATE] Required fields enforced
[STATE] All widgets functional
[STATE] System saves changes successfully
[DOM] Updated category reflects changes
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify updated data
[CONSOLE] No errors on save
Failure_Signals: Blocks missing from edit screen; save fails silently; changes not reflected after save
Cleanup: restore original category name via Admin

Title: Delete Category - Cancel
Steps:
[NAV] Right-click on category > Delete
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation dialog
[ACT] Click Cancel
Assertions:
[STATE] Confirmation dialog displays
[STATE] System does not delete category
[DOM] Category remains in catalog tree
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories — verify category still listed
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Category deleted despite Cancel; dialog not shown; tree item disappears

Title: Delete Category - Confirm
Preconditions: Admin logged in, test category exists
Steps:
[NAV] Right-click on test category > Delete
[ASSERT] Verify confirmation dialog
[ACT] Type 'Yes'
[ACT] Click Confirm
[ASSERT] Verify category removed
Assertions:
[STATE] Confirmation requires typing 'Yes'
[STATE] System deletes category
[STATE] Subcategories handled appropriately
[STATE] Products in category handled per rules
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories — verify absent
[CONSOLE] No errors on delete
Failure_Signals: Category not removed; 'Yes' not required; subcategories become orphaned; products lost

Title: Add Tax Type to Category
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Catalog module > Any catalog
[NAV] Right-click on category > Manage
[ACT] Click Edit button next to Tax type
[ACT] Enter new tax type name
[ACT] Click Add
[ACT] Click Save
[ASSERT] Verify in Tax type dropdown
Assertions:
[STATE] Manage dictionary values (Tax types) screen displays
[STATE] New tax type name added to Current values list
[STATE] System saves new values
[DOM] New tax type appears in dropdown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify taxType in response
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Tax type not in dropdown; dictionary screen not accessible; save fails
Cleanup: delete added tax type via Admin

Title: Delete Tax Type from Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, tax type exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to category > Manage
[ACT] Click Edit next to Tax type
[ACT] Select checkbox opposite one tax type value
[ACT] Click Delete button
[ACT] Click Save
[ASSERT] Verify tax type removed from list
Assertions:
[STATE] Manage dictionary values screen displays
[STATE] Checkbox selection works
[STATE] Tax deleted from list
[STATE] Save button becomes active
[STATE] Changes saved successfully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify taxType removed
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Tax type still appears after delete; checkbox not selectable; save button stays inactive

Title: Add New Image to Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, category exists, image file ready
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Catalog module > Any catalog
[NAV] Right-click on category > Manage
[ACT] Click on Images widget
[ACT] Click Add button
[ACT] Specify image category and language
[ACT] Drag and drop image to upload zone
[ACT] Click OK on Upload Images screen
[ACT] Click OK on Manage images screen
[ACT] Click Save on category details
[ASSERT] Verify image in category images list
Assertions:
[STATE] Manage images screen displays
[STATE] Upload Images screen allows drag-drop
[STATE] Image category and language selectable
[STATE] Image uploaded successfully
[STATE] Image added to category
[DOM] Uploaded image findable in images list
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify images array
[NETWORK] Image URL returns 200
[CONSOLE] No upload errors
Failure_Signals: Upload dialog not opening; drag-drop not working; image not persisted after save

Title: Add New SEO to Category
Test_Data: seoUrl=test-category-seo; seoTitle=Test SEO Title; metaDesc=Test meta; adminUrl={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Catalog module > Any catalog
[NAV] Right-click on category > Manage
[ACT] Click on SEO widget
[ACT] Click Add
[ACT] Fill in all SEO fields (URL, Title, Meta Description, Keywords)
[ACT] Click OK
[ACT] Click Save on category details
Assertions:
[STATE] New SEO screen opens with empty fields
[DOM] All SEO fields available: URL, Title, Meta Description, Keywords, Language
[STATE] SEO added to SEOs list
[STATE] Changes saved successfully
[STATE] SEO data applied to category
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify SEO block

[CONSOLE] No errors

Title: Add QuickReview Description to Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, catalog with category_1 created
Steps:
[NAV] Open Catalog > Select category_1
[ACT] Click Description widget
[ACT] Click Add > Choose QuickReview type
[ACT] Choose language (e.g. EN-en)
[ACT] Add description content
[ACT] Click Save
[ASSERT] Verify widget counter increases
[NAV] Go to Storefront > Open category_1
[ASSERT] Verify description displays via Liquid
Assertions:
[STATE] Description widget opens
[STATE] QuickReview type selectable
[STATE] Language selector works
[STATE] Description saved successfully
[STATE] Widget shows count increase
[DOM] Description visible on storefront (via Liquid template)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify descriptions array
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} category page — verify QuickReview content rendered
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Counter not incrementing; description not visible on storefront; Liquid template error in console

Title: Delete Category with Descriptions
Preconditions: Catalog with category_1 created, description_1 added to category_1
Steps:
[NAV] Open Catalog > Locate category_1 with description_1
[ACT] Right-click > Delete category_1
[ACT] Confirm deletion
[NAV] Check on storefront
[ASSERT] Verify category and descriptions removed
Assertions:
[STATE] Category removed with all content
[STATE] Descriptions deleted along with category
[DOM] Category no longer on storefront
[STATE] No orphaned description data
[STATE] Deletion properly cascades
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories — verify absent
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} — verify category not in navigation
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Orphaned descriptions remain; category still visible on storefront; 500 error on storefront after delete

Title: Category Image Upload
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), a test image file (JPG or PNG under 5 MB) ready for upload
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Open an existing category or create a new one
[ACT] Click on the Images tab within the category blade
[ACT] Click the Upload or Add Image button
[ACT] Select a valid image file from the local filesystem
[WAIT] Wait for upload to complete
[ACT] Click Save
Assertions:
[STATE] Upload dialog opens correctly
[STATE] Image uploads without errors
[DOM] Uploaded image thumbnail is visible in the Images tab
[STATE] Category saves with the image attached
[NETWORK] Image URL is accessible and renders in the browser
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Image URL returns 200
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify images array
[CONSOLE] No upload errors
Failure_Signals: Upload dialog not opening; upload fails with no error; thumbnail not shown after upload

Title: Category SEO Configuration
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), Stores module accessible with at least one store configured
Test_Data: seoSlug=test-category-slug; pageTitle=Test Category Title; metaDesc=Test meta description; storeId={{STORE_ID}}; adminUrl={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Open an existing category
[ACT] Click on the SEO tab within the category blade
[ACT] Click Add SEO or select a store to configure SEO
[ACT] Enter a SEO URL keyword (slug)
[ACT] Enter a page title
[ACT] Enter a meta description
[ACT] Click Save
Assertions:
[STATE] SEO tab is accessible on the category blade
[STATE] SEO URL keyword field accepts input and validates uniqueness
[STATE] Page title and meta description fields accept input
[STATE] SEO data saves successfully
[STATE] Saved SEO values persist after reopening the category
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify SEO data in response
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} category URL — verify meta title and description tags
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Duplicate slug accepted; SEO data not persisted; meta tags not rendered on storefront

Title: Toggle Category Visible Checkbox
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), an existing category is available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Open an existing category
[ACT] Locate the Visible checkbox in the Properties or Details section
[ASSERT] Note the current state of the checkbox
[ACT] Toggle the Visible checkbox to the opposite state
[ACT] Click Save
[NAV] Reopen the category and verify the saved state
Assertions:
[STATE] Visible checkbox is present on the category form
[STATE] Checkbox state toggles on click
[STATE] Toggled state saves correctly
[STATE] Reopened category shows the updated Visible value
[STATE] No errors occur on save
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id} — verify isVisible field toggled
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Checkbox not toggling; state reverts after save; API not reflecting UI change
Cleanup: restore original Visible state via Admin

Title: Unit of Measure Group CRUD
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), Catalog module with UoM feature enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module > Units of Measure section
[ACT] Click Add to create a new UoM group
[ACT] Enter a unique group name (e.g. Weight)
[ACT] Save the group and verify it appears in the list
[ACT] Open the group and edit the name (e.g. Weight Units)
[ACT] Save and verify updated name
[ACT] Delete the group via the Delete button
[ACT] Confirm deletion and verify the group no longer appears in the list
Assertions:
[STATE] New UoM group is created and visible in the list
[STATE] Group name updates correctly on edit
[STATE] Delete action removes the group permanently
[STATE] No orphaned data remains after deletion
[STATE] All CRUD operations complete without errors
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/measureunits — verify group lifecycle
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Group not created; edit not saved; delete leaves orphaned units; API returns stale data
Cleanup: none (group created and deleted within test)

Title: Unit of Measure Unit CRUD
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), at least one UoM group exists
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module > Units of Measure
[NAV] Open an existing UoM group
[ACT] Click Add Unit to create a new unit (e.g. kg - kilogram)
[ACT] Enter unit name, short name, and conversion factor
[ACT] Save the unit and verify it appears within the group
[ACT] Edit the unit short name and conversion factor
[ACT] Save changes and verify updates
[ACT] Delete the unit and confirm it is removed from the group
Assertions:
[STATE] New unit is created within the group with correct fields
[STATE] Unit name, short name, and conversion factor save correctly
[STATE] Edited values persist after save
[STATE] Deleted unit no longer appears in the group list
[STATE] Group integrity is maintained after unit deletion
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/measureunits/{groupId} — verify unit lifecycle
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Unit not created; conversion factor not saved; delete leaves unit in UI; group integrity broken
Cleanup: none (unit created and deleted within test)

Title: Category Automatic Links
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend ({{BACK_URL}}), category linked to a virtual catalog
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to Catalog module
[NAV] Open a category that has virtual catalog associations
[NAV] Navigate to the Links tab
[ASSERT] Verify automatic links from virtual catalog assignments are listed
[ASSERT] Inspect each link for correct catalog and path information
[ASSERT] Confirm no stale or broken links appear after catalog restructuring
Assertions:
[STATE] Links tab is accessible on the category blade
[STATE] Automatic links reflect current virtual catalog associations
[STATE] Link details (catalog name, path) are accurate
[STATE] Stale links from deleted associations are not shown
[STATE] No errors appear when viewing the Links tab
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/catalog/categories/{id}/links — verify links array
[CONSOLE] No errors
Failure_Signals: Stale links shown after reassignment; broken link navigation; links tab errors
